headline: Japan Issues ‘Final’ Warning Before Intervention, Lifting Yen

headline: Morgan Stanley now sees Fed holding rates in 2026
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley has shifted its outlook for U.S. monetary policy, now expecting the Federal Reserve to hold rates steady for the remainder of 2026 before cutting in early 2027, following the April Federal Open Market Committee meeting.

content.title: Morgan Stanley now sees Fed holding rates in 2026
content.summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley has shifted its outlook for U.S. monetary policy, now expecting the Federal Reserve to hold rates steady for the remainder of 2026 before cutting in early 2027, following the April Federal Open Market Committee meeting.

headline: Banks Kick Off $3.1 Billion Loan for CoreWeave Amid AI Boom
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Morgan Stanley and Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group Inc. kicked off an approximately $3.1 billion leveraged loan for CoreWeave Inc., adding to $2.75 billion raised earlier this month amid a debt boom related to data centers.Most Read from BloombergNorth Korea Confirms Suicide Rule for Soldiers Ukraine CapturesUS Seeks to Deploy Hypersonic Missile for the First Time Against IranJunior Bankers Sick of Grunt Work Build $2 Billion AI Tool to Do the JobUAE Quits OPEC as War Upends Oil Ma
